Package org.apache.arrow.datafusion.config

Class ExecutionOptions.Builder

java.lang.Object
org.apache.arrow.datafusion.config.ExecutionOptions.Builder
Enclosing class:
ExecutionOptions
public static final class ExecutionOptions.Builder extends Object
Builder for ExecutionOptions.

    Whether to collect statistics during query execution.

    Whether to enable recursive common table expressions.

    Whether to enforce batch size limits in join operations.

    Whether to keep partition-by columns in query output.

    Whether to infer partitions from directory structure.
    ExecutionOptions.Builder
    listingTableIgnoreSubdirectory(boolean value)
    Whether to ignore subdirectories when listing table files.

    Maximum number of buffered batches per output file.
    ExecutionOptions.Builder
    maxSpillFileSizeBytes(long value)
    Maximum spill file size in bytes.
    ExecutionOptions.Builder
    metaFetchConcurrency(int value)
    Number of concurrent metadata fetch operations.
    ExecutionOptions.Builder
    minimumParallelOutputFiles(int value)
    Minimum number of parallel output files.
    ExecutionOptions.Builder
    objectstoreWriterBufferSize(long value)
    Buffer size for object store writer in bytes.
    ExecutionOptions.Builder

    Parquet-specific options.
    ExecutionOptions.Builder
    perfectHashJoinMinKeyDensity(double value)
    Minimum key density for perfect hash join eligibility.
    ExecutionOptions.Builder
    perfectHashJoinSmallBuildThreshold(int value)
    Maximum number of entries for the "small" side in a perfect hash join.
    ExecutionOptions.Builder
    planningConcurrency(int value)
    Number of threads to use for planning concurrency.
    ExecutionOptions.Builder
    skipPartialAggregationProbeRatioThreshold(double value)
    Probe ratio threshold for skipping partial aggregation.
    ExecutionOptions.Builder
    skipPartialAggregationProbeRowsThreshold(int value)
    Probe rows threshold for skipping partial aggregation.
    ExecutionOptions.Builder
    skipPhysicalAggregateSchemaCheck(boolean value)
    Whether to skip the physical aggregate schema check.
    ExecutionOptions.Builder
    softMaxRowsPerOutputFile(long value)
    Soft maximum number of rows per output file.
    ExecutionOptions.Builder
    sortInPlaceThresholdBytes(long value)
    Threshold below which sorts are performed in-place (in bytes).
    ExecutionOptions.Builder
    sortSpillReservationBytes(long value)
    Memory reserved for sort spill operations in bytes.
    ExecutionOptions.Builder
    spillCompression(SpillCompression value)
    Compression codec used for spilling intermediate results to disk.
    ExecutionOptions.Builder
    splitFileGroupsByStatistics(boolean value)
    Whether to split file groups by statistics for better parallelism.
    ExecutionOptions.Builder
    targetPartitions(int value)
    Number of target partitions for repartitioning.
    ExecutionOptions.Builder
    timeZone(String value)
    Default time zone for temporal operations.
    ExecutionOptions.Builder
    useRowNumberEstimatesToOptimizePartitioning(boolean value)
    Whether to use row number estimates to optimize partitioning.

  • Method Details

    • batchSize

      public ExecutionOptions.Builder batchSize(int value)
      Number of rows processed per batch. Default is 8192.

    • coalesceBatches

      public ExecutionOptions.Builder coalesceBatches(boolean value)
      Whether to coalesce small batches into larger ones.

    • collectStatistics

      public ExecutionOptions.Builder collectStatistics(boolean value)
      Whether to collect statistics during query execution.

    • targetPartitions

      public ExecutionOptions.Builder targetPartitions(int value)
      Number of target partitions for repartitioning. Default is the number of CPU cores.

    • timeZone

      public ExecutionOptions.Builder timeZone(String value)
      Default time zone for temporal operations. Default is "+00:00" (UTC).

    • planningConcurrency

      public ExecutionOptions.Builder planningConcurrency(int value)
      Number of threads to use for planning concurrency.

    • skipPhysicalAggregateSchemaCheck

      public ExecutionOptions.Builder skipPhysicalAggregateSchemaCheck(boolean value)
      Whether to skip the physical aggregate schema check.

    • spillCompression

      public ExecutionOptions.Builder spillCompression(SpillCompression value)
      Compression codec used for spilling intermediate results to disk.

    • sortSpillReservationBytes

      public ExecutionOptions.Builder sortSpillReservationBytes(long value)
      Memory reserved for sort spill operations in bytes.

    • sortInPlaceThresholdBytes

      public ExecutionOptions.Builder sortInPlaceThresholdBytes(long value)
      Threshold below which sorts are performed in-place (in bytes).

    • maxSpillFileSizeBytes

      public ExecutionOptions.Builder maxSpillFileSizeBytes(long value)
      Maximum spill file size in bytes.

    • metaFetchConcurrency

      public ExecutionOptions.Builder metaFetchConcurrency(int value)
      Number of concurrent metadata fetch operations.

    • minimumParallelOutputFiles

      public ExecutionOptions.Builder minimumParallelOutputFiles(int value)
      Minimum number of parallel output files.

    • softMaxRowsPerOutputFile

      public ExecutionOptions.Builder softMaxRowsPerOutputFile(long value)
      Soft maximum number of rows per output file.

    • maxBufferedBatchesPerOutputFile

      public ExecutionOptions.Builder maxBufferedBatchesPerOutputFile(int value)
      Maximum number of buffered batches per output file.

    • listingTableIgnoreSubdirectory

      public ExecutionOptions.Builder listingTableIgnoreSubdirectory(boolean value)
      Whether to ignore subdirectories when listing table files.

    • listingTableFactoryInferPartitions

      public ExecutionOptions.Builder listingTableFactoryInferPartitions(boolean value)
      Whether to infer partitions from directory structure.

    • enableRecursiveCtes

      public ExecutionOptions.Builder enableRecursiveCtes(boolean value)
      Whether to enable recursive common table expressions.

    • splitFileGroupsByStatistics

      public ExecutionOptions.Builder splitFileGroupsByStatistics(boolean value)
      Whether to split file groups by statistics for better parallelism.

    • keepPartitionByColumns

      public ExecutionOptions.Builder keepPartitionByColumns(boolean value)
      Whether to keep partition-by columns in query output.

    • skipPartialAggregationProbeRatioThreshold

      public ExecutionOptions.Builder skipPartialAggregationProbeRatioThreshold(double value)
      Probe ratio threshold for skipping partial aggregation.

    • skipPartialAggregationProbeRowsThreshold

      public ExecutionOptions.Builder skipPartialAggregationProbeRowsThreshold(int value)
      Probe rows threshold for skipping partial aggregation.

    • useRowNumberEstimatesToOptimizePartitioning

      public ExecutionOptions.Builder useRowNumberEstimatesToOptimizePartitioning(boolean value)
      Whether to use row number estimates to optimize partitioning.

    • enforceBatchSizeInJoins

      public ExecutionOptions.Builder enforceBatchSizeInJoins(boolean value)
      Whether to enforce batch size limits in join operations.

    • objectstoreWriterBufferSize

      public ExecutionOptions.Builder objectstoreWriterBufferSize(long value)
      Buffer size for object store writer in bytes.

    • enableAnsiMode

      public ExecutionOptions.Builder enableAnsiMode(boolean value)
      Whether to enable ANSI SQL mode.

    • perfectHashJoinSmallBuildThreshold

      public ExecutionOptions.Builder perfectHashJoinSmallBuildThreshold(int value)
      Maximum number of entries for the "small" side in a perfect hash join.

    • perfectHashJoinMinKeyDensity

      public ExecutionOptions.Builder perfectHashJoinMinKeyDensity(double value)
      Minimum key density for perfect hash join eligibility.

    • parquet

      public ExecutionOptions.Builder parquet(ParquetOptions value)
      Parquet-specific options.

    • build

      public ExecutionOptions build()
      Builds the ExecutionOptions.
